goal_results.evidence: crates/config/src/version.rs created with `pub const VERSION: &str = match option_env!("MOLTIS_VERSION") { Some(v) => v, None => env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") };`. Exported via `pub use version::VERSION;` in crates/config/src/lib.rs:18.

All production env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") usages replaced with moltis_config::VERSION: crates/cli/src/main.rs:359, crates/gateway/src/server.rs:3283+5054, crates/gateway/src/state.rs:478, crates/mcp/src/client.rs:140, crates/node-host/src/runner.rs:151, crates/swift-bridge/src/lib.rs:1380-1381. Remaining references are only the fallback in version.rs itself and a DO-NOT-USE comment in providers/src/openai_codex.rs (not an actual usage). Grep confirms no bare production env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") remains.

crates/gateway/src/update_check.rs: is_newer_version() rewritten with match on (parse_date_version, parse_date_version) handling all 4 combinations: both-date (tuple compare), date-vs-semver (date wins), semver-vs-date (no update), both-semver (existing logic). parse_date_version() validates 8-digit date + sequence, rejects semver. Tests: parses_valid_date_versions, rejects_invalid_date_versions, compares_date_versions, date_version_newer_than_any_semver, semver_not_newer_than_date_version all pass.

.github/workflows/release.yml: tag trigger changed from 'v*' to '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9]'. Version resolution uses GITHUB_REF_NAME directly (no v-strip). MOLTIS_VERSION env var injected into all cargo build steps. All 'Verify Cargo workspace version matches release version' steps removed. Added validate-tag job. build-args MOLTIS_VERSION passed to Docker build.

scripts/prepare-release.sh: accepts optional YYYYMMDD.NN argument, auto-computes next sequence from git tags when omitted, validates format with regex ^[0-9]{8}\.[0-9]{1,2}$, removed all Cargo.toml version bump logic (awk block deleted).

cliff.toml:59 tag_pattern changed to '[0-9]{8}\.[0-9]{2}'. cliff.toml:7 template body uses '{{ version }}' without trim_start_matches. CHANGELOG.md header updated to 'Versions use date-based format: `YYYYMMDD.NN`.' replacing Semantic Versioning reference.

Dockerfile:45-46 adds ARG MOLTIS_VERSION + ENV MOLTIS_VERSION. justfile uses ${MOLTIS_VERSION:-...} fallback in 4 arch-pkg/appimage recipes. homebrew.yml removes v-prefix stripping (VERSION="${TAG}") and updates download URLs to remove 'v' prefix. CLAUDE.md:222-224 documents date-based versioning scheme and MOLTIS_VERSION env var.

judge_notes: All 8 goals fully met. The agent executed the entire 16-section migration plan: created version.rs with option_env! + fallback, replaced all production CARGO_PKG_VERSION usages, rewrote update_check comparison logic for date-based versions, updated CI/CD workflows, prepare-release.sh, cliff.toml, Cargo.toml, Dockerfile, justfile, homebrew workflow, and CLAUDE.md. test.sh returned reward=1.0 with all 145 config crate tests passing. Score = 3*0.235 + 5*0.059 = 1.00.
